ddls:
CREATE TABLE "usb_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each USB standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the USB standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the USB standard */,
  "released_year" INTEGER /* Year the standard was released */,
  "revision_number" TEXT /* Revision number of the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation mode */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the USB standard the mode belongs to */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation mode */,
  "nominal_voltage" TEXT /* Nominal voltage for the mode */,
  "max_current" TEXT /* Maximum current for the mode */,
  "max_power" TEXT /* Maximum power for the mode */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the mode */,
  "default_current" TEXT /* Default current for the mode */,
  "default_power" TEXT /* Default power for the mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_modes_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES usb_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., External Hard Drive, Camera) */,
  "power_requirements" TEXT /* Power requirements of the device */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the USB standard the device uses */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation mode the device uses */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the device vendor */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES usb_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES operation_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each USB port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the USB port */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system or device the port is on */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the USB standard the port supports */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation mode the port is set to */,
  "current_usage" TEXT /* Current usage of the port (e.g., 500mA) */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the port is enabled */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Whether the port is available for use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ports_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES usb_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ports_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ports_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES operation_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of the system (e.g., Desktop, Laptop, Server) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the system */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the system is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being connected */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the USB port being used */,
  "connection_date" TEXT /* Date the device was connected */,
  "disconnection_date" TEXT /* Date the device was disconnected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the connection (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., Data, Charging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_connections_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_connections_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power usage record */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device connection */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the power usage was recorded */,
  "voltage" TEXT /* Voltage used by the device */,
  "current" TEXT /* Current drawn by the device */,
  "power" TEXT /* Power consumed by the device */,
  "total_energy_consumed" TEXT /* Total energy consumed by the device in Wh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_usage_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES device_connections ("connection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that triggered the alert */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the USB port involved */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., Overcurrent, Overvoltage) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Engineer, IT Staff, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, Logout, View Device) */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system being accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_privileges" (
  "privilege_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each privilege */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role with the privilege */,
  "privilege" TEXT /* Privilege being granted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the privilege */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("privilege_id")
)
